focus_anchor: current focus end to end automation
why_now: the prior code-quality focus surfaced two real instances of this self-healing-eligible failure shape in a single week (TB-204, TB-207 — both hit briefing-shape pitfalls already catalogued in CLAUDE.md's "Shell-bullet pitfalls to AVOID" section). Goal.md's axis-2 delete-test (L98-100): "if this work didn't ship, every briefing-shape regression cascades into operator-manual unfreeze; with it, the loop self-heals on the recurring class." The class is well-defined, the agent already self-diagnoses, the briefing edit is mechanical. Without this, every recurrence remains an interruption; with it, the walk-away envelope expands by the rate at which briefing-shape regressions arrive (observably non-zero on this codebase).
